item.title: Bethlehem Lights Recalls Bethlehem Lights 10-inch Illuminated Ribbon Spheres Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Fire Hazard; Sold by QVC
item.company: Bethlehem Lights LLC, of Naperville, Illinois
item.brand: Bethlehem Lights LLC, of Naperville, Illinois
item.summary: The recalled Bethlehem Lights 10-inch Illuminated Ribbon Sphere is a spherical ornament made of reflective, silver-toned material with a spiral faceted design. The sphere is illuminated from within by numerous small warm-white LED lights. The product has a 10-inch diameter.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Bethlehem Lights 10-inch Illuminated Ribbon Spheres.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled illuminated spheres immediately and contact Bethlehem Lights for a full refund. Consumers should immediately unplug the product from the wall and cut the power cord. To receive a refund, consumers will be asked to email a photo of the product with the cut cord to ribbonsphere@bethlehemlights.com before disposing of it in the garbage.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
